tests.scenario: Subscription price visibility before trial confirmation
tests.expected_result: The system displays clearly (not in fine print) the exact subscription price user must pay after free trial period is over and billing date before user presses the confirm subscription button

steps: Wait until free trial period is over
tests.expected_result: The price paid and billing date matches the actual subscription terms displayed before confirming free trial
The cancel subscription option is present and clear
Subscription is successfully canceled

steps: Wait until 24 hours before trial ends
tests.expected_result: User receives a notification that their trial is about to end tomorrow

tests.scenario: Notification delivered when device is offline and reconnects
steps: Disable the internet connection of the device more than 24 hours before the trial end time
Re-enable internet connection during the 24-hour period before the trial ends
tests.expected_result: The system delivers the reminder notification after reconnection and before the trial expires
Only one subscription prompt is displayed during the session
The new session shows only one subscription prompt is displayed as well

steps: Listen to it for the full duration
tests.expected_result: The audio plays without any interruptions

tests.scenario: Playback stability while app is in the background
tests.expected_result: Audio continues playing without interruption
An error message is displayed and clearly explain the issue is due to no internet connection

steps: Throttle network speed down to simulate slow connection
tests.expected_result: The system displays a clear error message indicating that the request timed out
Response time is less than 5 seconds for at least 95% of the requests

tests.scenario: Response time under peak load across multiple geographic regions
steps: Send audio requests from multiple devices in multiple different geographic regions
tests.expected_result: Response time is less than 5 seconds for at least 95% of the requests

tests.scenario: Post-training new user meditation session timing
steps: Provide a standardized 15 minute introduction session covering basic app navigation to a group of new users
Ask each user to start a meditation session without assistance
Measure the time each user takes to successfully start the session
tests.expected_result: At least 80% of the users successfully start a meditation session within 3 minutes without external assistance

tests.scenario: Retention of training effectiveness after delay
steps: Provide a standardized 15 minute introduction session covering basic app navigation to a group of new users
Ask each user to start a meditation session without assistance
Measure the time each user takes to successfully start the session
tests.expected_result: At least 80% of the users successfully start a meditation session within 3 minutes without external assistance

steps: Wait for response from customer support
tests.expected_result: Response is received within 1 week
At least 95% of the responses occur within 1 week

steps: Navigate to the support request status page
tests.expected_result: System displays the current request status
System displays the updated progress

tests.scenario: Normal case: Navigation to audio within 5 clicks
steps: Navigate from home screen to a calming audio
tests.expected_result: User reaches the calming audio within 5 clicks

tests.scenario: Worst case: Navigation to audio within 5 clicks
steps: Navigate from home screen to a calming audio through the least direct menus
tests.expected_result: User still reaches the calming audio within 5 clicks
